event: View of rooftops in a French town
description: A watercolor painting showing a view looking down over clustered rooftops of a French town. Red and brown tile roofs with orange-red chimneys are visible at various angles, partially obscured by the lush green foliage of a large tree on the right. The buildings are rendered in soft washes of cream, pink, and grey. The sky above is pale and hazy. The composition has a gentle, intimate quality of an everyday observation from an upper window.
